[In the next two verses the author refers to the effects of the
shapes of these Dark Shafts.]
If the Dark Shaft on the solar disc should appear in the form
uf a rud, the effect would be death to the king; if in the form of a
truncated body, it would cause danger of diseases; if in the form
of a crow, there would be serious trouble from thieves; and lastly
if in the form of a nail or wedge; there would be famine,
[The ancients must have come to the above conclusions after
long and minute observations. For, they have given different evil
effects for the Shafts appearing in different shapes.]
If the Sun's disc be attacked by the Shafts in the form of
royal paraphernalia such as the umbrella, banner, chowrie etc.., it
is an indication uf change of rulership; and if the solar orb is co-
vered with sparks of fire, smoke or something similar to that, there
would be destruction of human life on a large scale,
